positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system; structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
protocol-based appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction + digestion/gut-comfort support
NOT a standalone fat-burner claim product
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
relevant for PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS, menopause-related weight gain (not a cure claim)
exclusions: do not state product is for users below 18 years of age
caution_conditions: first 3 days can be adjustment phase (internal handling guidance)
protocol_morning: zero-calorie drinks allowed (tea, coffee, lemon water, jeera water)
protocol_night: OK Powder + OK Tablet around 15 minutes before bed
typically after dinner gap (maintain 2-hour gap between dinner and bedtime)
fasting_rules: zero-calorie drinks may be consumed during fasting window
eat ONLY when true hunger is felt; no fixed meal timing
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be adjustment phase
distinguish public claim from internal guidance for support team consistency
guarantee: if weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, full refund applies
conditions: protocol adherence + daily tracker sharing
refund processed within 2 days after return parcel reaches
continuation: can continue until target weight or BMI 25 is reached
after every 30 days, take 7 to 10 day break
purpose of break: help body accept reduced weight as new normal and learn maintenance
maintenance: BMR-based intake (1200-1400 kcal for female, 1400-1600 kcal for male)
macro order: protein -> fiber -> fats -> carbs
heavy lunch, light dinner before 7 PM
maintain 3-hour gap between dinner and bedtime
limit outside food to once a week
proof_points: 3 to 5 kg in 15 days result claim
founder Dr. Arun Tyagi (34 years experience, BAMS, M.D. Kaya Chikitsa)
